# Architecture

Refinex-Notes is organized as a Tauri desktop application with a React frontend in `src/` and a Rust native module in `src-tauri/`. The repository is currently in an early implementation phase: `src/App.tsx` now renders the first real workspace shell, GitHub App Device Flow + keyring-backed session restore gate the shell at startup, the native file backend + workspace watcher + SQLite metadata store are wired through Tauri commands, and the richer product architecture lives in team-authored design documents under `docs/design-docs/`.

That distinction matters for agents. The source tree describes the current executable system; the design docs describe the intended future system. When making changes, treat code paths in this file as implemented boundaries and treat `docs/design-docs/*.md` as architectural references and decision records.

## Module Map

```text
refinex-notes/
Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ src/                    React 18 frontend bundle
Ōöé   Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ components/         Domain UI (`ai`, `auth`, `editor`, `git`, `settings`, `sidebar`, `ui`)
Ōöé   Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ editor/             Editor-core ProseMirror schema and future parser/runtime helpers
Ōöé   Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ hooks/              Thin hooks over client state
Ōöé   Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ services/           Frontend-side adapters for future Tauri IPC
Ōöé   Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ stores/             Zustand state containers
Ōöé   Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ plugins/            Frontend plugin entry points
Ōöé   ŌööŌöĆŌöĆ types/              Shared TypeScript types
Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ src-tauri/              Tauri 2 Rust crate
Ōöé   Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ src/commands/       IPC command layer
Ōöé   Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ src/ai/             AI provider registry, HTTP clients, and SSE streaming domain
Ōöé   Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ src/git/            Git engine, auth bridge, and sync state machine
Ōöé   Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ src/markdown/       Planned Markdown parsing/export domain
Ōöé   Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ src/search/         Tantivy index, fuzzy matcher, and search commands
Ōöé   Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ src/state.rs        Shared native app state (`AppState`)
Ōöé   Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ src/db.rs           SQLite bootstrap and recent-workspace metadata
Ōöé   Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ src/watcher.rs      Workspace file watcher and debounced event bridge
Ōöé   ŌööŌöĆŌöĆ tauri.conf.json     Desktop runtime and build wiring
Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ public/                 Static Vite assets
Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ skills/                 In-repo skill assets
ŌööŌöĆŌöĆ docs/                   Harness control plane and design references
```

## Dependency Directions

```text
src/main.tsx
  -> src/App.tsx
     -> src/components/*
     -> src/editor/*
     -> src/hooks/*
     -> src/stores/*
     -> src/services/*
        -> Tauri invoke/listen boundary
           -> src-tauri/src/commands/*
              -> src-tauri/src/{ai,git,markdown,search,watcher,state,db}
```

### Current Runtime Shape

- `src/App.tsx` now gates the application through `checkAuth()`: unauthenticated users see `LoginScreen`, authenticated users enter the existing workspace shell with draggable/collapsible side panels, a sidebar workspace switcher backed by recent-workspace history, `SearchPanel`, `FileTree`, `TabBar`, a Git-aware `StatusBar`, `CommandPalette`, a native-backed workspace picker, a central `RefinexEditor`, and a document-area floating outline dock on the editor's right edge; the right panel now switches between Git setup and history views instead of placeholder copy.
- `src/editor/schema.ts` now owns the canonical ProseMirror document schema; `src/components/editor/schema.ts` is only a compatibility re-export so editor semantics stay centralized.
- `src/components/ui/` now contains working Radix/cmdk wrappers for Dialog, Popover, Tooltip, Toast, Command, Tabs, Collapsible, Context Menu, and Accordion instead of placeholder pass-through components.
- `src/components/auth/LoginScreen.tsx` now owns the GitHub Device Flow login UI: it renders the verification code, allows copying/opening the GitHub verification page, and reflects polling progress from the native channel while keeping token details out of the frontend.
- `src/stores/authStore.ts` now owns the client-side auth state machine (`checkAuth`, `login`, `logout`, device-code state, and polling progress) while `src/services/authService.ts` is the sole Tauri invoke boundary for auth commands.
- `src/stores/noteStore.ts` now supports both the existing mock shell state and a real workspace mode backed by Tauri commands for open/read/write/create/delete/rename/refresh.
- `src/services/fileService.ts` now owns the Tauri `invoke` calls, workspace directory picker, and `files-changed` event subscription used by the note store.
- `src/services/fileService.ts` now also fronts recent-workspace listing/removal commands so the sidebar workspace switcher can persist and manage history across app launches.
- `src/stores/gitStore.ts` now owns the frontend Git state model: workspace status refresh, sync event handling, history loading, and command dispatch all flow through the Git store instead of mock labels.
- `src/services/gitService.ts` now fronts the Tauri Git command boundary (`git_*`) plus the `git-sync-status` event listener, and `src/components/git/` contains the active SyncStatus / SetupPanel / HistoryPanel UI surfaces.
- `src/services/searchService.ts` now fronts the native search commands, `src/components/sidebar/SearchPanel.tsx` renders the sidebar search surface, and `CommandPalette` now delegates file lookup to native fuzzy search results instead of only sorting currently open documents.
- `src/components/ai/ChatPanel.tsx` now replaces the previous right-panel placeholder with a working AI conversation surface: provider/model selectors, multi-conversation session switching/creation/rename/delete controls, Markdown rendering, streamed output cursor, stop-generation action, current-document context chips, and `@`-triggered reference-document mentions all live inside the existing app shell.
- `src/components/ai/ProviderSelect.tsx`, `src/components/ui/select.tsx`, and `src/services/aiService.ts` now form the frontend AI command seam: provider/model data comes only from native `ai_list_providers` / `ai_list_models`, while `ai_chat_stream` is wrapped behind a Tauri `Channel` callback adapter instead of direct React-side provider SDK calls.
- `src/components/ai/ContextBuilder.ts` now builds the MVP system prompt from the current note, cursor neighborhood, outline headings, directory tree, and open/recent files; `src/stores/aiStore.ts` owns AI panel state, local multi-conversation persistence, stream lifecycle, provider/model loading, and cancellation semantics while reusing existing note/editor stores as context inputs.
- `src/components/ai/StreamRenderer.tsx` now reuses the shared `markdown-it` pipeline exported from `src/editor/parser.ts`, stabilizing incomplete fenced code blocks during streaming so partial Markdown can render without breaking the UI.
- `src/components/settings/SettingsDialog.tsx` now renders as an app-shell full-page settings surface instead of a `Dialog` modal. `src/App.tsx` switches the workspace between editor and settings surfaces, `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx` exposes the full-page content seam, and `GeneralSettings`, `EditorSettings`, `AIProviderConfig`, `GitSettings`, `ShortcutSettings`, and `AccountSettings` continue to own the section content while `src/components/ui/switch.tsx` and `src/components/ui/slider.tsx` extend the existing Radix wrapper layer for form controls.
- `src/services/settingsService.ts` and `src/stores/settingsStore.ts` now own the frontend settings seam: typed app settings, AI provider drafts, model catalog overrides, API key draft state, save/test actions, and theme/startup preferences all flow through a single Zustand store instead of local shell state.
- `src/App.tsx` now resolves theme mode from the persisted settings store (`light` / `dark` / `system`) and gates recent-workspace auto-restore behind the new `reopenLastWorkspaceOnStartup` preference instead of always reopening the most recent workspace.
- `skills/*.md` now act as repository-local built-in AI skills, with `src/services/skillService.ts` parsing YAML frontmatter + Markdown body into a typed catalog used by the editor surfaces instead of scattering skill definitions through React constants.
- `src/editor/commands/ai-insert.ts` and `src/editor/plugins/ai-write-highlight.ts` now own direct editor-side AI output: streamed tokens can replace the current selection, insert at the cursor, create a new document via the note store, or fall back to chat response mode, while a temporary highlight decoration shows the active write span and fades after completion.
- `src/editor/ui/FloatingToolbar.tsx`, `src/editor/ui/SlashMenu.tsx`, and `src/editor/RefinexEditor.tsx` now expose three AI entry points over that shared execution path: selection toolbar SkillPicker, `/ai-*` slash triggers, and an editor context-menu AI submenu.
- `src-tauri/src/commands/auth.rs` now implements the GitHub App Device Flow (`github_auth_start`, `github_auth_poll`, `check_auth_status`, `github_logout`) plus a tightly-scoped `open_external_url` helper used by the login screen to open the GitHub verification page in the system browser; keyring storage now keeps a structured GitHub session so `check_auth_status` can refresh expiring user access tokens.
- `src-tauri/src/state.rs` now keeps the embedded `github_client_id` and `pending_device_code` in `AppState`, allowing the native auth commands to share login context across command calls without asking end users for runtime configuration.
- `src-tauri/src/db.rs` creates `~/.refinex-notes/meta.db` with `settings`, `recent_workspaces`, and `file_meta` tables during app startup.
- `src-tauri/src/commands/files.rs` now enforces workspace-scoped file operations and recursive file-tree scanning while ignoring `.git`, `node_modules`, and `.DS_Store`.
- `src-tauri/src/git/mod.rs` now implements `git2-rs` backed repository init/clone/status/stage/commit/fetch/push/pull/log/diff primitives, while `src-tauri/src/git/auth.rs` bridges the GitHub OAuth token in keyring to HTTPS remote credentials.
- `src-tauri/src/git/sync.rs` now owns the auto-sync state machine and emits `git-sync-status` events through a background tokio task; `src-tauri/src/commands/git.rs` exposes the native Git commands plus auto-sync lifecycle controls to the frontend IPC boundary.
- `src-tauri/src/ai/mod.rs` now owns provider metadata, built-in model catalog defaults, keyring lookup conventions, and the `AIProvider` trait; `src-tauri/src/ai/streaming.rs` parses SSE frames into structured events and supports single-stream cancellation; `src-tauri/src/ai/providers.rs` implements the OpenAI-compatible and Anthropic HTTP clients used by the command layer.
- `src-tauri/src/db.rs` now stores provider metadata in the SQLite `settings` table and can deserialize optional model-catalog overrides, while the runtime falls back to native L1 defaults when no persisted catalog exists for a provider.
- `src-tauri/src/commands/settings.rs` now owns the typed app settings schema (`load_settings`, `save_settings`, `read_setting`, `write_setting`) backed by the SQLite `settings` table, giving theme/editor/git/startup preferences a native persistence boundary.
- `src-tauri/src/commands/ai.rs` now exposes both runtime and settings-facing AI commands: `ai_chat_stream`, `ai_cancel_stream`, `ai_list_providers`, `ai_list_provider_settings`, `ai_save_provider_settings`, `ai_list_models`, and `ai_test_connection`. The command layer now filters runtime providers to enabled + keyring-backed entries, persists provider/model catalog edits, and uses the system keyring for per-provider API keys.
- `src-tauri/src/search/mod.rs` now owns the in-memory Tantivy workspace index, Markdown-to-plain-text extraction, and Nucleo-backed fuzzy search; `src-tauri/src/search/indexer.rs` rebuilds or incrementally updates the index when the workspace opens or files change; `src-tauri/src/commands/search.rs` exposes `search_files` and `search_fulltext` to the frontend.
- `src-tauri/src/watcher.rs` uses `notify` to watch the active workspace and emits a debounced `files-changed` event back to the frontend.
- `docs/design-docs/Refinex-Notes Õ«īµĢ┤µŖĆµ£»µ×Čµ×äµ¢ćµĪŻ.md` and `docs/design-docs/Refinex-Notes Ķć¬ńĀöń╝¢ĶŠæÕÖ©ÕÅ»ĶĪīµĆ¦µĘ▒Õ║”Ķ░āńĀöµŖźÕæŖ.md` capture the intended editor, AI, Git, auth, and search architecture for subsequent implementation phases.

## Key Architectural Constraints

- Keep browser UI concerns in `src/` and native/runtime concerns in `src-tauri/`; do not bypass that split by embedding native logic in React components.
- Reuse the existing domain folders (`components`, `stores`, `services`, `commands`, `ai`, `git`, `markdown`, `search`) instead of creating alternate parallel trees.
- Treat service files in `src/services/` and command files in `src-tauri/src/commands/` as the contract seam between frontend and native code.
- Preserve the difference between implemented behavior and design intent: update `docs/design-docs/` when strategic direction changes, and update this file when the actual source tree changes.

## Technology Stack

| Layer | Technology | Version / Source |
|------|------------|------------------|
| Frontend runtime | React | `18.3.1` (`package.json`) |
| Frontend rendering | React DOM | `18.3.1` (`package.json`) |
| State management | Zustand | `5.0.12` (`package.json`) |
| Editor document model | ProseMirror (`prosemirror-*`) | `1.x` packages (`package.json`) |
| Build tool | Vite | `7.3.2` (`package.json`) |
| Language | TypeScript | `5.9.3` (`package.json`) |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS | `3.4.19` (`package.json`) |
| Desktop bridge | `@tauri-apps/api`, `@tauri-apps/plugin-dialog` / CLI | `2.10.1`, `2.7.0` (`package.json`) |
| Native runtime | `tauri` crate | `2.10.2` (`src-tauri/Cargo.toml`) |
| Native Git | `git2` | `0.19` (`src-tauri/Cargo.toml`) |
| Native Search | `tantivy`, `nucleo-matcher`, `comrak` | `0.22`, `0.3`, `0.36` (`src-tauri/Cargo.toml`) |
| Native storage / FS | `rusqlite`, `notify`, `walkdir`, `keyring` | `0.32`, `7`, `2`, `3` (`src-tauri/Cargo.toml`) |
| Native HTTP / async | `reqwest`, `tokio` | `0.12`, `1` (`src-tauri/Cargo.toml`) |
| Native serialization | `serde` / `serde_json` | `1.x` (`src-tauri/Cargo.toml`) |
